news.headline: Stevie Wonder's We Are You Foundation honored Arzum Ayse Inanoglu at Wayfinder Family Services' event.
news.summary: In a recent event in Los Angeles on December 11, 2024, Aundrae Russell, CEO of Stevie Wonder's We Are You Foundation, honored Arzum Ayse Inanoglu with the Stevie Wonder Star Student Award at Wayfinder Family Services' yearly holiday celebration. The award recognizes exceptional individuals within the organization, and this year's recipient was selected for their outstanding achievements. This marks a significant moment for Inanoglu, as they were acknowledged for their dedication and hard work by receiving this esteemed accolade.

news.headline: HKMA issues warning about fake sites linked to China CITIC Bank, tricking people with online banking. Be cautious!
news.summary: The public is being alerted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake websites and online banking login pages pretending to be China CITIC Bank International Limited. It is essential to stay cautious, as these fraudulent sites aim to deceive individuals. It is crucial to be vigilant while accessing online platforms related to banking operations. Stay informed and verify the authenticity of websites to protect personal and financial information. Take necessary precautions to prevent falling victim to such online scams. Being proactive is key to maintaining cybersecurity in the digital age.

Volvo and DHL begin autonomous operations in Texas, aiming to transform freight transport in the US.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on December 11, 2024, Volvo Autonomous Solutions (V.A.S.) and DHL Supply Chain have unveiled a milestone initiative to revolutionize freight transport in the United States. This collaboration is poised to reshape the way goods are transported, with a focus on enhancing efficiency and safety. Stay tuned for further developments on this transformative project.

news.headline: Chairman of the Board Professor Hans Wigzell resigns from Karolinska Development AB, new Chairman to be appointed.
news.summary: In Stockholm, Sweden on December 11, 2024, Karolinska Development AB (traded on Nasdaq Stockholm as KDEV) revealed that Professor Hans Wigzell, the company’s Chairman of the Board, will step down from his role. The Board of Directors will promptly begin the search for a new Chairman to fill the vacancy.

news.headline: BitFuFu secures 10-year lease for 2 mining facilities in the US with 33 MW capacity, aims to acquire majority stake.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, BitFuFu Inc., a prominent player in Bitcoin mining and related services traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FUFU, disclosed securing 10-year exclusive lease contracts for two Bitcoin mining sites in the United States. These facilities possess a collective capacity of 33 megawatts (MW). The agreements further entail an option for BitFuFu to purchase a controlling interest in the said mining operations.

news.headline: Blackwell 3D is conducting a feasibility study for large-scale 3D-printed construction in the UAE, aiming to identify locations for the project.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Blackwell 3D Construction Corp. (OTC: BDCC) disclosed its commencement of a self-financed feasibility study to pinpoint optimal sites for a major 3D-printed housing endeavor in the UAE. As a pioneering 3D house printing technology entity, Blackwell 3D envisions revolutionizing the construction sector with advanced techniques focused on eco-friendliness and productivity. This venture marks a noteworthy progression in the adoption of innovative methodologies within the industry.

news.headline: Titan Mining Corp (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) amends credit facility with National Bank to deleverage by end of 2025, allowing growth projects.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 11, 2024, Titan Mining Corporation (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) has reached an agreement to amend its credit facility with the National Bank of Canada established on June 6, 2022. This amendment aims to reduce Titan's debt substantially by the conclusion of 2025, enabling the Company to have the flexibility to pursue several growth projects.

news.headline: ArcelorMittal and LanzaTech reach ethanol production milestone; first barge from flagship facility shipped in Belgium. Ethanol volumes support large-scale shipping to CarbonSmart customers like Coty.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, LanzaTech Global, Inc. (LNZA) and ArcelorMittal S.A. (MT) announced a significant milestone at ArcelorMittal's Steelanol facility in Ghent, Belgium. Ethanol production has increased to a level that allows for large-scale shipping by barge. LanzaTech received the first barge shipment earlier in the month, and the ethanol is now on its way to be purified and sold to CarbonSmart customers like Coty. This advancement marks progress in the joint effort between LanzaTech and ArcelorMittal to establish a sustainable ethanol supply chain in Europe.

news.headline: European Wax Center selects Chris Morris, with 25+ years of consumer business leadership, as new CEO.
news.summary: An experienced executive with over 25 years of leadership, operational, and development experience in consumer industries has been appointed to the team.

news.headline: Relay Therapeutics reports 11.4-month median PFS in 2L patients with PI3Kα-mutated, HR+/HER2- metastatic breast cancer.
news.summary: Recent interim data reveals that patients with PI3Kα-mutated, hormone receptor positive, HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer who are undergoing their second line of treatment have achieved a median progression-free survival of 11.4 months at the recommended phase 2 dose.

news.headline: Serina Therapeutics' Chief Development Officer to present at LNP Summit in Boston on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Serina Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that their Chief Development Officer, Randall Moreadith, MD, PhD, is set to speak at the 3rd Annual LNP Immunogenicity & Toxicity Summit in Boston, MA. The event will focus on "Overcoming Anti-PEG Antibody Responses" with a special emphasis on Serina's proprietary POZ Platform™ drug delivery technology. Serina is a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on the NYSE American under the symbol SER. This news was shared on Dec. 11, 2024 from Huntsville, AL.

news.headline: California-based finance company announces early repurchase of FR001400JLY7.

Global composite material testing market valued at US$1.9 billion in 2023, set to reach US$3.4 billion by 2034 at 5.4% CAGR. Demand driven by lightweight composite structures in aerospace, transportation, and renewable energy. Testing critical for material reliability and quality standards. Key drivers include aerospace, transportation, and renewable energy sectors, with advancements in non-destructive testing techniques.
news.summary: The global composite material testing market was valued at US$ 1.9 billion in 2023 and is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 5.4% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 3.4 billion by 2034. The rising demand for lightweight composite structures in aerospace, transportation, and renewable energy sectors is fueling this growth. Composite materials combine different materials to enhance properties like strength and durability. These materials are crucial in industries like aerospace and wind energy, improving performance and energy efficiency. Composite material testing ensures these materials meet strict standards through destructive and non-destructive testing methods. The aerospace industry heavily relies on these materials for fuel efficiency, while transportation and wind energy sectors use them for better performance and reduced emissions. Innovations in non-destructive testing techniques like ultrasonic and radiographic methods enable defect detection without damage.

news.headline: Over half of Americans plan financial resolutions for 2025, top ones being saving more (42%), earning more (35%), and spending less (35%).
news.summary: In a recent national survey by Discover® Personal Loans, it was found that 54% of U.S. consumers intend to make financial resolutions for the year 2025. The top priorities for Americans include saving more (42%), increasing earnings (35%), reducing spending (35%), enhancing credit scores (27%), establishing an emergency fund (26%), and paying off or consolidating debt (21%). Furthermore, a striking 94% of respondents foresee facing challenges that could hinder their financial goals.

news.headline: OpenX and ID5's partnership expands reach by 58% in Safari traffic, targeting unaddressable environments.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, OpenX Technologies, Inc., a top omnichannel supply-side platform, and ID5, a leading identity provider for digital advertising, have revealed a solution to broaden reach in typically hard-to-reach platforms like Safari, Firefox, and Edge. The partnership addresses the signal loss challenge in the industry by enabling OpenX buyers to utilize ID5 for expanding reach in previously unreachable environments. This collaboration aims to help advertisers tap into new addressable environments and enhance their presence in the digital advertising space.

news.headline: Global demagnetizers market projected to reach US$1,236.9 million by 2034, growing at 5.2% CAGR, driven by automotive and consumer electronics industries. China to witness fastest growth, benchtop demagnetizers preferred for high volume applications. Manufacturing sector plays a major role in market growth.
news.summary: The global demagnetizers market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.2% from US$745.0 million in 2024 to US$1,236.9 million by 2034. This growth is primarily driven by increasing demand from the automotive and consumer electronics industries, as well as advancements in technology and quality control regulations. Factors such as high initial investment costs and technological integration challenges may hinder market growth, particularly for small to medium-sized enterprises. China is expected to experience the fastest growth in the market due to its production and technological innovation priorities. Benchtop demagnetizers are preferred for their performance and reliability in high-volume applications. East Asia is exhibiting the fastest growth among regions, with the automotive industry accounting for about 33.5% of the market share in 2024. The historic growth rate for the global market was 2.8% during the period of 2019-2023.

news.headline: CyberArk unveils FuzzyAI tool to combat AI model vulnerabilities. Helps organizations safeguard against jailbreaks.
news.summary: In London, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) unveiled FuzzyAI, an innovative open-source platform that has successfully hacked all major tested AI models. FuzzyAI assists organizations in pinpointing and resolving vulnerabilities in AI models, such as bypassing guardrails and producing harmful outputs. This solution is applicable to both cloud-based and internal AI models. This release aims to demonstrate to businesses attending Black Hat Europe 2024 how they can implement AI technologies while managing cybersecurity threats effectively.

news.headline: Arctic Wolf and Immersive Labs partner to tackle cybersecurity talent deficit by offering 1 million entry-level jobs.
news.summary: Arctic Wolf, a prominent security operations provider, and Immersive Labs, a key player in people-centric cyber resilience, recently revealed their collaboration. In a bid to address the cybersecurity talent shortage, Arctic Wolf has become part of the Immersive Labs Cyber Million program. This initiative seeks to create opportunities for one million entry-level cybersecurity operations positions in the next ten years. With this partnership, Arctic Wolf has now opened entry-level cyber roles on the platform, contributing to the program's mission.

news.headline: Organigram to report Q4 & fiscal 2024 results on Dec 18, 2024; conference call scheduled at 8:00 am.
news.summary: In Toronto, Organigram Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI), the umbrella corporation for Organigram Inc., a prominent cannabis producer, revealed plans to disclose earnings for Q4 and fiscal year 2024, concluding on September 30, 2024, on December 18, 2024, prior to the market opening. The company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:00 AM to delve into the results.

news.headline: OrthoLite China recognized among top 500 manufacturing companies in Guangdong for 2024; total revenue of listed enterprises at 18.73 trillion.
news.summary: In Amherst, Massachusetts, OrthoLite®, a renowned provider of high-performance comfort footwear solutions, is pleased to announce that OrthoLite China (OCN) has been acknowledged as one of Guangdong’s Top 500 Manufacturing Enterprises for 2024. This prestigious recognition is awarded by the Guangdong Provincial Enterprise Confederation and Provincial Entrepreneurs Association in China. The collective revenue of these enterprises stood at an impressive 18.73 trillion dollars, showcasing the significant economic impact and success of the recognized companies.

news.headline: Advanced Elastomers Market expected to reach $7.8 billion by 2029 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: Delray Beach, Florida: On December 11, 2024, a report was released detailing the market for Advanced Elastomers. The report covers various types of elastomers including Thermoplastic Elastomers and Silicon Elastomers, their applications such as Insulations and Implants, and the end-use industries which include Medical, Industrial, Aerospace, and Defense sectors. The global forecast for the market extends up to 2029. The study focuses on the market size and growth prospects for advanced elastomers in different regions, presenting significant opportunities for growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Grocery TV partners with Hy-Vee to create one of the largest retail media networks in U.S., reaching millions in 400+ locations.

This partnership aims to facilitate brands in connecting with a vast audience of shoppers through digital advertising across over 400 retail locations. The strategic alliance opens up opportunities for brands to engage with millions of shoppers effectively. This development was disclosed on December 11, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: CTC Global appoints Steve Zogas as CFO with over 2 decades of leadership experience - focusing on enhancing financial rigor and shareholder value.
news.summary: CTC Global, a key player in Advanced Conductor technologies for the energy industry worldwide, headquartered in Irvine, California, has recently chosen Steve Zogas as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Steve, a veteran with more than 20 years of experience in leading high-growth companies, will be concentrating on strengthening financial discipline, operational efficiency, and boosting shareholder value at CTC Global. Prior to joining CTC Global, Steve held the position of CFO at Titan Acquisition H.

news.headline: Sanctuary Wealth partners with BNY Pershing's Wove Platform to boost client experience in Indianapolis on Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: Sanctuary Wealth recently announced the integration of BNY Pershing's Wove platform, enabling partner firms to enhance the client experience. This collaboration will offer elite financial advisors the opportunity to elevate their services by leveraging the advanced features of Wove. The move comes as part of Sanctuary Wealth’s mission to provide its partners with the tools and resources necessary to succeed in the ever-changing financial landscape. The integration, unveiled in Indianapolis on December 11, 2024, showcases Sanctuary's commitment to empowering advisors with increased freedom, flexibility, control, and choice. This development signifies a significant step towards enhancing the overall experience for both advisors and clients.

news.headline: Paragon Health Institute publishes report on AI in healthcare, unveiling guidelines for regulation.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the Paragon Health Institute unveiled a crucial report on the use of artificial intelligence in the healthcare sector. Titled "Healthcare AI Regulation: Guidelines for Maintaining Public Protections," the report aims to provide comprehensive insights into the regulatory framework surrounding AI in healthcare. The institute is renowned for its pioneering work in healthcare research and policy development. This report is expected to have a significant impact on shaping the future of AI integration in healthcare, with its findings and recommendations likely to influence policymakers and industry stakeholders.

news.headline: Lowe's reveals 2025 strategy for growth, updates targets in Investor Conference. Dec 11, 2024. $LOW (NYSE) #financialtargets

During the event, the company shared insights on its major growth and efficiency plans, along with updates on both short-term and long-term financial goals. This gathering served as an update for investors and analysts, offering a comprehensive view of Lowe's strategies for sustainable expansion. Important financial targets and milestones were discussed during the conference to ensure transparency and alignment with stakeholders.

news.headline: Venture capital survey of life sciences investors with $300bn find focus on new investments, strong M&A expected. Top requirements: Team, Science, Differentiation.
news.summary: Venture capitalists are currently showing a preference for making new investments rather than focusing on their existing portfolio. They are prepared to deploy significant funds for mergers and acquisitions, indicating a strong M&A market. The key criteria for top investors are the quality of the team, scientific foundation, and the uniqueness of the product or service. This trend is prominent in the investment landscape as of December 11, 2024, particularly in a hub like London.

iOnctura's Phase I study shows roginolisib's efficacy in uveal melanoma, doubling overall survival. Phase II site activation underway.
news.summary: The recently finished Phase I trial, known as DIONE-01, has showcased the clinical effectiveness and extended safety profile of roginolisib, a distinctive allosteric modulator of PI3Kδ. Notably, patients diagnosed with uveal melanoma displayed a significant increase in overall survival, doubling the rates seen in previous cases. The study has led to the continual activation of sites for the upcoming randomized Phase II trial.
